title: Wand Variety (Staffs)
description: A Forge mod that adds a variety of wands (staffs) that when combined can be turned into a godly powerful wand.
body:
Wand Variety Wand Variety is a mod that currently adds 6 new types of wands with different useful functionalities. Here is a complete description of each one: Lightning Wand - When right clicking, it will summon lightning around you in a 5x5 space. - When left clicking, it will use one Lightning as ammo to summon 3 lightning strikes to where you're looking. Crafting Recipe:
Do you see 2 new items? Well that's a Lightning Block and a Wand Energy. I'll show you what's the Wand Energy later. Lightning Block and Lightning This mod adds a lightning item and a Lightning Block as part of the Lightning Wand. Every time lightning strikes a Undead, Arthropod, Illager or Water mob, a Lightning Block will spawn. This Lightning Block can be uncrafted into Lightning (the aforementioned ammo) like this:
The Lightning Block can be recrafted by using this recipe:
When walking on the Lightning Block, your speed increases. You're jump also boosts when jumping on top of this block. Levitation Wand - When right clicking, it will give you levitation for a set amount of time. - When left clicking or swinging, it will give you slow falling. - When hitting a mob, it'll make it levitate. Use the right and left click wisely to fly efficiently. Crafting Recipe:
Ice Wand - When holding right click, it will place a 3x3 space of frosted ice beneath you, allowing you to go through the sky (like Frozone). - When left clicking, it'll throw a snowball. Crafting Recipe:
Destroyer Wand - When holding right click, it'll remove all the blocks around you. - When left clicking, it'll place an ignited TNT 5 blocks away. Crafting Recipe:
Wither Skull Wand - When right clicking, it'll make a explosion just like when the Wither spawns. - When left clicking, it'll throw a Wither Skull like the Wither does. Crafting Recipe:
All of these can be repaired by Wand Energy or with the item they're crafted with or a similar one in a anvil. But then there's... Optume Wand - When right clicking, if you're in air you will be able to fly. You will also be granted a lot of status effects that protect you. - When right clicking while sneaking, it'll make a big explosion. You will also be granted a lot of status effects that protect you. - When left clicking while sneaking, it'll throw a really powerful spectral hour. - When hitting a mob, it'll summon 3 lightning strikes and make a small explosion. Crafting Recipe:
Nice.. but what are those Wand Energy items? Wand Energy Used to craft all the wands. Crafting Recipe:
Optume Wand Energy Used to craft the Optume Wand. Crafting Recipe:
That's basically all there is to it!! Make suggestions at my server: https://discord.gg/s7xYjBWDu4 Made by RoCris
